name: Hugging Face Inference Providers
description: Registers Hugging Face Inference Providers as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Hugging Face user access token used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate fallback Hugging Face token used when no api_key Plugin Setting or HF_TOKEN is configured.

settings.label: Hugging Face token
settings.description: Hugging Face user access token used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to HF_TOKEN, then HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY.

providers.name: Hugging Face Inference Providers
providers.description: Refreshes Hugging Face chat models from the upstream router catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
